negative_policy: below-threshold routes to needs_review, not automatic fail
threshold_policy: selected from validation set at <=0.001 false-clear tolerance, then checked against synthetic holdout and approved-COLA positive holdout
notes: This model is intentionally narrow: it classifies whether an isolated GOVERNMENT WARNING heading crop is confidently bold.
It does not decide warning text correctness; OCR/rule checks handle capitalization and exact wording separately.
Approved public COLA heading crops provide positive real-domain calibration. Synthetic regular/degraded crops provide negative/review safety checks.
